high_risk_patterns.name: dynamic_sql_exec_string
high_risk_patterns.message: Dynamic SQL executed from a string variable. Prefer sp_executesql with parameters.

high_risk_patterns.name: sql_concatenates_input
high_risk_patterns.message: SQL text appears to concatenate a variable. Review for SQL injection risk.

high_risk_patterns.name: broad_db_owner_reference
high_risk_patterns.message: Broad privileged role detected. Confirm this is documentation, not a grant.

high_risk_patterns.name: hardcoded_password
high_risk_patterns.message: Possible hardcoded password. Use environment variables or a secret manager.

high_risk_patterns.name: unsafe_sql_f_string
high_risk_patterns.message: Possible SQL built with an f-string. Use bound parameters.

high_risk_patterns.name: unsafe_shell
high_risk_patterns.message: shell=True can execute unintended commands. Avoid unless strictly controlled.
